title: Urgent Opening Teacher at ASCI International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at ASCI International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ASCI International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About ASCI International Enterprises:
ASCI International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ASCI International Enterprises!
